integrations.summary: N/A - Pure frontend refactoring, no external service changes. api.getConfig() and api.setConfig() remain unchanged.

performance.summary: N/A - Reduces API calls from 12 to 1, net positive. No new performance concerns.

security.summary: N/A - No auth, permissions, or sensitive data changes. Config is model/provider selection only.

architecture.summary: React Context + useReducer following StudioContext pattern. Single ConfigProvider in App.tsx. Context holds cached config, components use useConfig() hook. Local model overrides allowed per-component. No refreshConfig needed before runs.

ui-ux.summary: Keep current render-nothing-until-ready behavior. Expose loading flag for completeness but no skeleton required. ModelSelector retains saving spinner with server-confirmed updates.

edge-cases.summary: Server-confirmed updates only (no optimistic). On error, context retains previous good config. Legacy route pages migrated for consistency even though not currently rendered.
